short_term_high_commit.reason: High-value deal with only 12-month term; review for missed multi-year opportunity

payment_terms_rule.reason: Payment terms other than Net 30 require Finance review.

deal_investment_rule.reason: Requested deal investment exceeds 10% of annual commit.

deal_investment_preapproved.description: AE preapproved deal investment pool expressed as a percent of annual commit.

demand_planning_rule.reason: Demand planning is incomplete while deal investment funds are requested; Practice Manager review is required to validate PS&T capacity and scope.

annualized_consumption_rule.reason: Proposed annual commit is below the customer annualized trailing 3-month run-rate, indicating potential under-sizing, demand planning risk, or missed expansion opportunity.

Publicity / Reference Rights.reason: Customer modified publicity or reference rights language; Legal review is required before accepting non-standard approval rights or reference limitations.

Renewal.reason: Customer modified renewal language; Finance review is required because renewal mechanics, pricing protection, or auto-renewal treatment may affect forecast and future revenue.

Usage / Overages.reason: Customer modified usage or overage language; Finance review is required because true-up, overage billing, and consumption treatment may affect revenue recognition or demand planning.

Rollover.reason: Customer modified rollover language; Finance review is required for commercial and revenue impact, and Practice Manager review may be required when demand planning is incomplete or adoption risk is present.

rollover_rule.reason: Requested rollover of unused committed spend requires Finance review because it may affect renewal economics, forecast quality, revenue treatment, and future consumption discipline.

rollover_without_demand_plan_rule.reason: Requested rollover while demand planning is incomplete requires Finance and Practice Manager review to validate commit sizing, adoption risk, delivery scope, and the plan for consuming any rolled-over balance.
